prairie.optInBody: By activating the Great Garden, your flower (8 petal scores) will be visible to other gardeners in anonymized form. You can receive dew drops and pollen. You can disable this at any time in My account.
prairie.optInRgpd: GDPR compliant: you control the visibility of your data. Only your pseudo, avatar and anonymized scores will be shared.
prairie.boutiqueSubtitle: Your Sap, your purchases, and soon Seeds — in one place.
prairie.boutiqueWhereBody: On Stripe’s secure servers (official checkout). Fleur d’AmOurs never stores your card number.
prairie.boutiqueWhenBody: SAP packs are credited automatically a few seconds after payment (return here or refresh). If it’s delayed, wait a minute or reopen the shop.
prairie.boutiqueHowBody: Pick an offer below: you’re sent to Stripe to pay, then you return here. If you cancel, nothing is charged.
prairie.boutiqueWhyBody: SAP powers the Tutor AI and some journey actions. Subscriptions and credit packs raise your quotas (sessions, draws…) — see My account for details.
prairie.boutiqueLoginHint: Sign in to see offers and pay.
prairie.boutiqueSapGaugeHint: SAP purchase buttons are grouped in the “Secure payment” section below.
prairie.boutiqueNoOffers: No offers are available right now (Stripe configuration or missing prices).
prairie.boutiqueCanceled: Payment canceled — you can try again anytime.
prairie.boutiqueSectionEmpty: No offers in this category yet.
prairie.noFleurs: No flowers in the Prairie yet.
prairie.noFleursHint: Make sure the other gardener has activated « Profile visible » in My account, then refresh.
prairie.activateToSee: Activate your public profile in My account to appear here.
prairie.linksHint: Lines connect people who have completed a duo together
prairie.inviteDuoHint: Invite to complete the Fleur DUO questionnaire together
prairie.removeLinkHint: Remove the connection between your flowers

common.offline: No connection — your changes may not be saved.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Discover your 8 forms of love, explore guided sessions and draw cards to illuminate your questions.
onboarding.pillarDiscoverDesc: My Flower and Duo — your love profile in 24 questions
onboarding.pillarExploreDesc: Sessions and readings — cards and conversation to move forward
onboarding.pillarAccompanyDesc: Chat and Dream Walk — support and introspection
onboarding.sapIntro: You have 50 Sap to discover the app.
onboarding.sapIntroMore: Sap is used for doors, readings and sessions. Check your balance in My account.
onboarding.fleurIntro: 24 questions, ~8 min. Your 8 dimensions of love take shape.
onboarding.tirageIntro: Choose your intention, the card answers you. You can also do the 4 Doors.
onboarding.sessionIntro: AI-guided session: 4 doors (Heart, Time, Climate, Story), ~25–40 min.
onboarding.fleurCompleteDesc: Your 8 dimensions of love are now visible. Draw a card to illuminate them.
onboarding.tirageDoneHint: Find your reading in My Flowers or history.
onboarding.sessionDoneHint: Check your 14-day Plan and Chronicle to revisit this journey.
onboarding.sapFirstTimeDesc: The app's usage currency. The Hourglass resets each month, the Crystal accumulates. Used for doors, readings, etc.

dashboard.title: My Garden
dashboard.sessionInProgress: You have an exploration in progress
dashboard.readingDesc: One card or the 4 Doors to illuminate your question
dashboard.statsDesc: Number of sessions, readings, flowers and dream walks completed.
dashboard.sanctuaireLiensDesc: Gardeners you're linked to in the Grand Garden (duos or direct links).
dashboard.chatHistoryDesc: View your message history with the coaching team.

sap.label: Sap
sap.title: Sap
sap.desc: Sap is used for readings, explorations and sessions. Hourglass = monthly (resets each month). Crystal = permanent.
sap.petaleArgenteBonus: Each Crystal adds up. At 200: +20 Hourglass, silver look and +10% Sap on each reset.
sap.auraUnlocked: ✦ Crystal Aura unlocked — +10% Sap on each reset

fleurSynthese.title: Your synthesis Flower
fleurSynthese.subtitle: Overlay of your readings, flowers and sessions
fleurSynthese.infoDesc: Combines all your readings, My Flower questionnaires and sessions. Each petal reflects a dimension of love.
fleurSynthese.empty: Your flower will take shape as you explore

evolution.title: Evolution
evolution.infoDesc: Compare your current flower (active session) with your 30-day average.

chronicle.title: Chronicle
chronicle.desc: Your synthesis phrases from sessions and readings.
chronicle.empty: Your synthesis phrases will appear here

insight.title: Science of the Flower
insight.subtitle: Synthesis of your inner garden (facts & hypotheses)
insight.infoDesc: Global synthesis generated from your petal profile and, when available, from conversation evidence.
insight.probabilisticNote: The hypotheses below are tentative: you can hide them anytime.
insight.chatContextMissing: Note: the synthesis currently uses only petal profile (no Clairiere/coach context yet).

confirmation.title: Confirm action
confirmation.sapConsume: This action uses {saison} Seasonal Sap and {eternel} Eternal Sap. Confirm?

fleur.tokenDesc: Keep it to access your result or launch a DUO reading.

mesFleurs.emptyDesc: Complete a My Flower or DUO questionnaire.

duo.duoNotYet: Your response has been saved, but the DUO result is not yet available.
duo.inviteFailed: Sending failed. Check spam or use « Copy link » to share manually.
duo.inviteError: Unable to send invitation. Use « Copy link » to share manually.
duo.title: Fleur d'AmOurs — DUO
duo.subtitle: Two people · One shared profile · One common Flower
duo.how1: You answer 24 questions → your individual Flower
duo.how2: You share your token with your partner
duo.how4: You get your DUO Flower: three overlaid radars
duo.personBDesc: You've been invited to complete the DUO reading by {email}.
duo.personBDescNoEmail: You've been invited to complete the DUO reading.
duo.legendAB: Pink = Person A (who sent the invite) · Green = Person B (invited)
duo.shareLinkToPartner: Share this link with your partner:
duo.inviteHint: Your partner will need to create an account or log in to fill in the questionnaire. If they don't receive the email, ask them to check spam or share the link manually above.
duo.inviteFromPrairieBanner: You will invite {pseudo} to do a Duo. Fill in your questionnaire first.
duo.staticExplanation:
This breakdown shows where you stand together on each dimension of the Fleur d'AmOurs: petals in phase show your points of agreement, zones to adjust show moderate gaps to explore together.

Desynchronized dimensions represent marked differences that can enrich or question your bond.

tarot.title: Fleur d'AmOurs Tarot
tarot.subtitle: Intuitive reading · Systemic questioning
tarot.oneCardDesc: One card offers a simple, focused insight — a keyword, an image for your question.
tarot.fourDoorsDesc: The 4 Doors explore four dimensions — Heart, Time, Climate, History — to approach a question from multiple angles.
tarot.reflectionQuestion: What does this card awaken in you?
tarot.reflectionPlaceholder: What this card evokes in me…
tarot.fourReflectionPlaceholder: What this reading evokes in me…
tarot.fourReflectionDesc: What does this 4 Doors reading tell you about your situation? Write or dictate freely.
tarot.noReadingsDesc: Do a simple or 4 Doors reading.
tarot.useTabs: Use the tabs above to get started.
tarot.clickReveal: Click each door to reveal it, focus your intention on each card.
tarot.introDesc: A reading invites you to set an intention and receive the cards as a mirror to illuminate a situation.
tarot.oneCardDesc2: One card offers a simple, focused perspective — a keyword, an image, an energy to accompany your question of the moment.
tarot.fourDoorsDesc2: The 4 Doors explore four dimensions — Heart, Time, Climate, History — to approach a question from multiple angles.
tarot.quotaErrorSap: Monthly limit reached. You need {missing} more Sap{s} for a reading (5 required). Activate a promo code or subscribe.
tarot.quotaErrorFree: You have reached your monthly limit of {limit} free readings. Activate a promo code or subscribe to continue.
tarot.synthHeart: The Door of the Heart opens with '{name}', which gives the inner tonality and quality of love from which you enter the situation: {synth}
tarot.synthVegetal: This tonality unfolds over time through the vegetal cycle, with '{name}', which describes how the process evolves, matures or resists: {synth}
tarot.synthElements: The cycle of elements, with '{name}', specifies the emotional, mental or material climate influencing this movement: {synth}
tarot.synthLife: Finally, the Door of History, with '{name}', places everything in a broader trajectory and indicates what this passage is transforming: {synth}
tarot.commentPlaceholder: What this reading evokes in me…
tarot.intentionPlaceholder: E.g.: How do I get through this period of doubt?
tarot.intentionOptional: Leave empty for an open reading

session.doorConfirm: Opening this door uses 15 Sap. Confirm?
session.deleteConfirm: Delete this session? This action is irreversible.
session.leversEmptyHint: Micro-levers will be personalized based on your session. If this stays empty, the AI could not generate them — use your anchors above as guides.
session.plan14Subtitle: Each day: theme and concrete action
session.accompanimentText: Personal support can help you go further.
session.breathePhrase: Before leaving, place a hand on your heart.
session.doorReason: An image will resonate with you.
session.sovereigntyHint: If a score doesn't feel right, adjust it. Your perception is the source of truth.
session.takeBreath: Take a breath to integrate what has shifted, then receive your synthesis and 14-day plan.
session.unfoldHint: Expand to see Flower and cards
session.shadowDedicatedSpace: This shadow part deserves dedicated space. Personal support can help you explore it.
session.shadowAccompanyFull: This session highlighted dynamics in tension. These shadow parts deserve deeper exploration — and that's exactly where personalized support can make a difference.
session.flowerReadyPlan: Your Flower has taken shape. Ready to receive your 14-day plan?
session.leviersSubtitle: 3 concrete micro-levers linked to your habits
session.step1Desc: An open question — what is alive in you right now
session.step2Desc: The Tutor follows your words, images and threads — not a script
session.step3Desc: Drawn through the conversation, like mirrors
session.step4Desc: Your dynamic card emerges from what you truly say
session.step5Desc: 3 concrete micro-levers linked to your habits
session.disclaimer: Note: This tool is not therapeutic or an oracle. It is a compassionate mirror that helps you see what you already know.
session.breatheEnter: Take a breath. Are you ready to enter an exploration of about 25 to 40 minutes?
session.quotaReachedDesc: You have used your free sessions this month.
session.doorsDesc: 4 doors to explore · 4–6 exchanges per door
session.firstQuestion: What is present for you right now?
session.cardContext: A Fleur d'AmOurs Tarot image will resonate with you — it won't tell you anything external, it illuminates what is already there.
session.accompanyDistress: What you are going through goes beyond the scope of this tool. Human support can make a difference.
session.accompanyLight: Personalised support can help you explore what is emerging here.
session.synthesisDefault: Your journey through the four doors of the Garden nourishes this plan — personalise it according to what resonates with you.
session.errorBoundaryTitle: A moment of pause has arisen
session.errorBoundaryDesc: Your session is saved. You can resume or come back later.
session.tutorErrorSoft: The Tutor needs a moment to respond.
session.tutorErrorSavedHint: Your message is preserved — you can resend it.
session.beforeLeaving: Before leaving, place a hand on your heart and hold with you one phrase from this journey.
session.synthesisFallback: Your journey through the four doors of the Garden nourishes this plan — personalise it according to what resonates with you.
session.plan14Desc: Each day: theme and concrete action
session.accompanyFull: Personalised support can help you anchor what you've discovered and explore further what matters to you.
session.zoomCard: Zoom on card to see details
session.thresholdInvite: Take a moment to settle, then share what comes.
session.thresholdQuestion: Right now, in your relational life…
session.thresholdSubQ: What is most alive for you — a tension, a desire, a question?
session.noRightAnswer: There is no right answer — whatever comes is precious.
session.dynamicHelp: This dynamic can help you move through this zone.
session.shadowBeyondTool: What you are going through goes beyond the scope of this tool. Human support can make a difference.
session.tuteurListening: The Tutor is taking time to listen to you…
session.cardCanIlluminate: A card from this door can illuminate your exploration.
session.synthesizeBeforeMoving: Synthesise what you discovered before moving on.

session.noCompletedSessions: No completed sessions yet. Complete a session to see your plans and summaries here.
session.planNotGenerated: Plan not yet generated for this session.

contact.title: Personal appointment request
contact.pageSubtitle: Personalised coaching can be offered via videoconference or phone.
contact.whyDesc: This tool is a compassionate mirror. Coaching allows you to go further: put into words what has emerged, explore possible paths, and receive a kind outside perspective.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Briefly describe your situation, needs or questions…
contact.gdprText: I agree that my information will be used to respond to my request. It will not be shared with third parties and can be deleted upon request at
contact.successBody: Your request has been received. We will contact you within 48 working hours at {email}.
contact.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.
contact.openChatsTitleOne: One conversation to pick up right away
contact.openChatsTitleMany: {n} conversations to pick up right away
contact.openChatsSubtitle: You already have a thread open with the team — continue here instead of waiting for email.

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

presentation.label: Presentation
presentation.welcomeTitle: Welcome to the Fleur d'AmOurs Ecosystem
presentation.welcomeSubtitle: Mapping the Invisible, Harmonising the Living
presentation.intro: The Fleur d'AmOurs is a living mirror designed to reveal the health of your bonds — whether a relationship, a project, or your own inner alignment. Through the geometry of its 8 Petals, it decodes the energies at work — from the desire that drives action to the security that stabilises, up to the meaning that guides movement.
presentation.aiDesc: Natural dialogue and deep analysis. Ask your questions to the intelligence connected to the science of the Flower: it instantly identifies areas of fluidity and systemic knots, offering you a precise reading of your current situation.
presentation.aiTagline: Guided Garden of Love session · 4 doors · Personalised 14-day plan
presentation.tarotIntro: Consult the structure for immediate guidance:
presentation.tarotCardDesc: The central energy, the 'Heart' of the moment.
presentation.tarotDoorsDesc: The obligatory passage points for the evolution of your system:
presentation.tarotDoor2Desc: What needs to be set in motion.
presentation.tarotDoor3Desc: The challenge or transition to integrate.
presentation.tarotDoor4Desc: The resolution or fulfilment you are moving towards.
presentation.closing: Nourish your relationships. Clarify your ambitions. Harmonise your system.
presentation.gardenFeatureTitle: Garden of Love — Explore my Flower
presentation.gardenFeatureDesc: A session guided by an AI Tutor through the 4 doors (Heart, Time, Climate, History). Share what is alive in you, reveal your Fleur d'AmOurs Tarot cards, note your reflections and receive a personalised 14-day plan. Resume an ongoing session or start a new one.
presentation.tiragesFeatureDesc: Draw a card or launch a 4-Door reading. Each Fleur d'AmOurs Tarot card opens a reflection on your relational dynamics and a personalised synthesis.
presentation.disclaimer: This tool is not therapeutic or an oracle. It is a compassionate mirror that helps you see what you already know.
